MClash bundles the unmodified MetaCubeX mihomo Alpha executable built from:

Version: alpha-a70af27
Commit: a70af27451ac44f94ff5bd5db0bd9d4965460181
Repository: https://github.com/MetaCubeX/mihomo
Commit source: https://github.com/MetaCubeX/mihomo/tree/a70af27451ac44f94ff5bd5db0bd9d4965460181
Source archive: https://github.com/MetaCubeX/mihomo/archive/a70af27451ac44f94ff5bd5db0bd9d4965460181.tar.gz

mihomo is licensed under GPL-3.0. The complete license text and MClash's
third-party notice are included alongside this file in the application bundle.
